name: Multi-employer site exposure, who pays in Saint George?
description: Your employer comp + suits vs. negligent parties.

mainEntity.name: Multi-employer site exposure, who pays in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Your employer comp + suits vs. negligent parties.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Primary employer via comp; sue others as third-parties if negligent.** Construction common[5]. Key factors: Contract indemnity; exposure apportionment; joint liability. Utah allows pursuit. Identify all via contracts. Lawyer coordinates claims.
